call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that's… that's pretty good. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. So, to get this rolling, I just need to confirm a few details… your address is still Denver, Colorado? 
Eleanor: Yes, that's right. 
Agent: Perfect. And you're still employed at… 
Eleanor: Yes. Okay, let's do it.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I've already told someone from your company to stop calling me! 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We just wanted to inform you about… 
Robert: No, no, no. I don't need a credit card. I'm retired. I don't want any more debt. You guys called me yesterday! 
Agent: But sir, this card offers… 
Robert: (Interrupting) Look, I'm hanging up now. Don't call me again. Click.

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a pre-approved Personal Loan. Your friend, Michael, referred you. 
Jessica: Oh, right! Michael mentioned something. 
Agent: Great! So, we are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. What are you hoping to use the funds for? 
Jessica: I'm starting a small business, a bakery. I need equipment. 
Agent: That's fantastic! A bakery sounds wonderful. The monthly payments would be around $330 for 60 months. We can also discuss longer terms if you prefer. 
Jessica: Hmm, $330… that's doable. What about fees? I'm trying to keep startup costs low. 
Agent: There's a $350 application fee, and a $150 annual fee. We also have a small processing fee of 0.5% of the loan amount. 
Jessica: Okay, so… $350 plus $150, plus… what was that percentage again? 
Agent: 0.5%. So, $75 on the $15,000. We can break down all the costs for you in a detailed statement. 
Jessica: I think I need to think about it. It's a lot of money. Can you send me something in writing? 
Agent: Absolutely! I can email you a full loan agreement outlining all the terms and conditions. Would that be helpful? 
Jessica: Yes, please. That would be great.

Agent: Hello, David? This is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
David: Oh, yeah. I was just checking rates. 
Agent: Great! We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 17.99%. It comes with rewards points and travel insurance. 
David: 17.99%? That's… pretty high. I think I can find something better. 
Agent: Well, sir, our card offers… 
David: (Interrupting) I appreciate the offer, but I'm going to pass. I'll keep looking around. Thanks anyway. 
Agent: Okay, sir. If you change your mind, please don't hesitate to call us back. Have a good day.

Agent: Hello, Mrs. Rodriguez? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering… 
Maria: (Interrupting, loudly) You again?! I told you people, I do NOT want a loan! Where did you even get my number? This is harassment! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize… 
Maria: Apologize? You've called me three times this week! I'm going to report you to the authorities! I want my number removed from your list, NOW! 
Agent: Okay, ma'am, I understand. I will… 
Maria: (Interrupting) Just stop calling me! Click.
